Home CV Meemuja Suomeksi

Lassi Karjalainen

Bachelor of Technology in Information and Software Technology, Master's student in Technology Management

Corporate Relations Coordinator at the Student Union of the University of Jyväskylä, Linkki NakkiJYYstäjä, Linkki opposition and Poliukko

Email: lassikarjalainen0@gmail.com

Telegram: @LKKarjalainen

General nick: LKKarjalainen

Who

I am a 23-year-old Master's student in Technology Management at the University of Jyväskylä. I enjoy many hobbies like MTG, computer hardware and light videogame pirating.

I have work experience mainly in test automation and manual testing. I have also served as a patent specialist and business consultant. In my studies I have focused on computational programming and business studies.

What

Projects: GitHub

Profile: LinkedIn

Wiki: LinkkiWiki

I participate in the events of Linkki, Ynnä, Algo and JYY in varying amounts. The best event ever is definitely Jyväsmetro.

I am also known in places like Kattila, Teerenpeli and Hacklab Jyväskylä.

Where

Jyväskylä, or casually Jykylä.

I am often found in Kattila. Kattila's visitor tracker can show if "LKKarjalainen" is there.

The fastest way to reach me electronically is by calling or on Telegram.

Why

Active participation is interesting and task variety is refreshing.

Occasional programming or so-called tinkering is enjoyable.

Cool stuff

Tietotekniikan Opiskelijoiden Liitto ry
